title_zh: 基于义务逻辑的智能代理AI系统运行时治理策略
title_en: Deontic Policies for Runtime Governance of Agentic AI Systems
summary_zh: 基于大型语言模型驱动的自主智能代理AI系统带来新的安全、隐私和合规挑战。这类智能代理能调用工具、操作数据、安装软件并跨组织协作，需超越传统认证和访问控制，实施全面的企业治理管理，包括允许或禁止的行为、行动后的义务（如通知CISO）、义务的豁免条件及策略冲突的优先级。现有策略引擎如XACML、Rego和Cedar仅涵盖许可/禁止，缺乏义务生命周期管理、冲突解决和领域本体推理。我们提出了AgenticRei，基于Rei框架的义务逻辑策略语言，使用OWL表达并由独立于LLM的高性能逻辑引擎运行时评估，处理工具调用及代理间消息，能捕捉当前生产系统难以表达的安全与隐私治理约束，并与行业标准框架A2AS自然集成。
summary_en: Autonomous agentic AI systems powered by Large Language Models introduce new security, privacy, and compliance challenges. Such agents can invoke tools, manipulate data, install software, and coordinate across organizational boundaries, requiring governance beyond just authentication and access control. This includes specifying permitted and prohibited actions, obligations post-actions (like notifying the CISO), conditions for waiving obligations, and precedence rules for policy conflicts. Existing policy engines like XACML, Rego, and Cedar cover only permit/prohibit aspects and lack obligation lifecycle management, conflict resolution, dispensations, and ontological reasoning typical in healthcare, cybersecurity, or data privacy. We propose AgenticRei, implementing obligations, dispensations, conflict resolution, and reasoning using a deontic policy language built on the Rei framework, expressed in OWL and evaluated at runtime by a high-performance logic engine outside the LLM. The same system governs both agent tool use and inter-agent messages. Examples show deontic policies capture governance constraints on security and privacy not achievable with current engines. Our approach integrates naturally with industry frameworks like A2AS.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究提出的AgenticRei系统解决了当前智能代理治理中的关键不足，特别是在处理义务、冲突和本体推理方面的挑战。这对保护安全、隐私和合规至关重要，推动了复杂AI系统的可信运行，具备实用价值和广泛应用前景。
why_it_matters_en: The proposed AgenticRei system addresses critical gaps in governing agentic AI systems, especially handling obligations, conflict resolution, and ontological reasoning. This is vital for ensuring security, privacy, and compliance in complex AI deployments, demonstrating practical value and broad applicability for trustworthy AI operation.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Deontic Policies for Runtime Governance of Agentic AI Systems. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 跨主题覆盖、能力与认知深度的课程对齐测量：应用于CS2013与CS2023的纵向框架
title_en: Measuring Curriculum Alignment across Topical Coverage, Competency, and Cognitive Depth: A Longitudinal Framework Applied to CS2013 and CS2023
summary_zh: 本科计算机科学教育遵循每十年修订一次的国际课程指导方针，但缺乏可靠且可复制的方法来评估课程对当前指导方针的覆盖完整度及其随指导方针重构而变化的情况。该研究提出了一个人机结合的流程，以结构化语料库表示课程和指导方针，利用语义检索生成课程与知识单元的匹配候选，并通过人工判断确认覆盖情况。实证应用于一项通过认证的计算机科学本科课程，分别针对CS2013与CS2023，发现该课程对CS2023和CS2013的知识单元覆盖率分别约为49.7%和50.9%，近十年变化甚微。能力表达方面，课程能满足约88%的覆盖单元，但在CS2023的认知深度达标率为76%，低于CS2013的95%，反映了新版指导方针对深度的更高要求。研究还区分了课程结构性缺口与标准演进引起的差异。此工具可复用且作者提供索取。
summary_en: Undergraduate computer science education follows international curricular guidelines revised roughly every decade but lacks a reliable, reproducible method to measure program coverage of these guidelines and changes after guideline revisions. This study presents a human-in-the-loop pipeline representing programs and guidelines as structured corpora, using semantic retrieval to generate candidate matches between courses and knowledge units, confirmed by human judgment. Applied longitudinally to an accredited BSc program against CS2013 and CS2023, coverage was about 49.7% for CS2023 and 50.9% for CS2013, stable across the decade. The program articulates competency for ~88% of covered units, but delivers recommended cognitive depth for 76% under CS2023 versus 95% for CS2013, reflecting raised expectations rather than program shortcomings. Structural curriculum gaps and standard evolutions were distinguished. The reusable instrument is available from the authors upon request.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究通过结合机器辅助与人工判断，构建系统化且可复用的课程覆盖测量方法，为计算机科学专业课程评估提供了标准化量化工具，有助于各院校理解与调整其课程结构以适应新兴的教育指导需求。
why_it_matters_en: This research integrates machine-assisted and human validation to build a systematic, reusable method for measuring curriculum coverage, providing a standardized quantitative tool for computer science program assessment and aiding institutions in understanding and adjusting course structures to meet emerging educational guidelines.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Measuring Curriculum Alignment across Topical Coverage, Competency, and Cognitive Depth: A Longitudinal Framework Applied to CS2013 and CS2023. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 扩散语言模型：实验分析
title_en: Diffusion Language Models: An Experimental Analysis
summary_zh: 大型语言模型通过自回归生成实现了强大的任务表现。近年来，扩散语言模型作为替代范式，通过迭代去噪而非逐词预测生成文本，支持序列的并行优化。本文系统评测了八种先进的扩散语言模型，覆盖推理、编程、翻译、知识及结构化问题解决八个基准，综合考察生成质量与计算效率。并分析关键推理时因素如去噪步数、上下文长度、块大小及并行解码策略的影响，同时在相同条件下对小模型进行对比。研究揭示了任务、架构与推理预算对模型性能的影响及设计选择带来的性能与效率折中。研究为当代扩散语言模型的能力和部署特性提供了实用见解。
summary_en: Large Language Models have achieved strong performance via autoregressive generation. Recently, Diffusion Language Models (DLMs) generate text through iterative denoising, allowing parallel refinement of sequences. This work systematically evaluates eight state-of-the-art DLMs across eight benchmarks in reasoning, coding, translation, knowledge, and structured problem solving, assessing both generation quality and computational efficiency. It examines key inference factors such as denoising steps, context length, block size, and parallel unmasking strategies, and includes controlled comparisons of smaller models trained identically. The analysis highlights how task, architecture, and inference budget affect DLM behavior and how generation-time design choices create trade-offs between performance and efficiency. This study offers practical insights into the capabilities and deployment characteristics of contemporary DLMs.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究是首个系统性评测多种扩散语言模型在多领域任务上的性能与效率的工作，揭示了扩散模型设计参数的重要影响，帮助理解其优势与局限，指导实际应用部署。
why_it_matters_en: This work provides the first systematic evaluation of multiple diffusion language models across diverse tasks, revealing the significant impact of design parameters on performance and efficiency. It aids understanding of their strengths and limitations, guiding practical deployment and further research.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Diffusion Language Models: An Experimental Analysis. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 因果归因剪枝法在大型语言模型中保持推理性能
title_en: Pruning via Causal Attribution Preserves Reasoning Performance in Large Language Models
summary_zh: 大型语言模型在多步推理方面表现出色，但推理成本较高。本文提出了一种名为因果归因剪枝（CAP）的无训练方法，通过测量注意力头对推理任务的因果影响，识别关键注意力头，指导细粒度权重剪枝。CAP基于小规模校准集，估计屏蔽每个注意力头时的性能下降，并将因果得分转化为权重的重要性值。与仅基于权重大小或激活值的方法不同，CAP的干预测量直接反映注意力头的功能贡献，在20%稀疏率下，在ARC-Challenge数据集上相较于Wanda方法获得最高61%的相对准确率提升。在GSM8K、StrategyQA和ARC-Challenge数据集上的多种模型和稀疏率（10%、20%、50%）测试中，CAP大多优于Wanda，尤其是Llama-3模型在ARC-Challenge上的表现显著提升。结果表明，基于因果归因的注意力头剪枝在保持推理性能方面胜过相关性剪枝准则，但在50%高稀疏率下受限于粗粒度的MLP归因。
summary_en: Large language models excel at multi-step reasoning but incur high inference costs. This paper presents Causal Attribution Pruning (CAP), a training-free method that identifies critical attention heads by measuring their causal impact on reasoning tasks and uses these scores to guide fine-grained weight pruning. CAP estimates expected performance degradation when masking each attention head on a small calibration set, converting causal scores into weight importance values. Unlike magnitude- or activation-based criteria, CAP's interventional approach directly captures functional contributions of heads, achieving up to 61% relative accuracy improvements over Wanda on ARC-Challenge at 20% sparsity. Evaluated on GSM8K, StrategyQA, and ARC-Challenge across Llama-3-8B-Instruct and Mistral-7B-Instruct at various sparsities (10%, 20%, 50%), CAP outperforms Wanda in most cases, notably for Llama-3 on ARC-Challenge. Results suggest attention-head-level causal attribution better preserves reasoning performance than correlational pruning at similar sparsity, though limited by coarse MLP attribution at high sparsity.
why_it_matters_zh: 因果归因剪枝通过直接干预测量注意力头对推理任务的因果贡献，能够精准识别关键组件，从而实现更有效的剪枝，减少推理成本同时保持模型性能。这一研究有效解决了传统剪枝方法依赖相关性指标，导致推理性能下降的问题，提升了稀疏模型在实际推理场景中的适用性和效能。
why_it_matters_en: Causal Attribution Pruning directly measures the causal contribution of attention heads to reasoning tasks by intervention, enabling precise identification of critical components for more effective pruning. This approach addresses limitations of traditional correlation-based methods that often degrade reasoning performance, improving the applicability and efficiency of sparse models in practical inference scenarios.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Pruning via Causal Attribution Preserves Reasoning Performance in Large Language Models. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: LaViSA：语言与视觉结构歧义基准
title_en: LaViSA: A Language and Vision Structural Ambiguity Benchmark
summary_zh: 结构歧义指单句因句法结构可有多种有效解读，语言理解面临根本挑战。视觉场景作为有效线索，有助解析此类歧义。LaViSA基准设计用于评估视觉与语言模型（VLMs）利用视觉信息解决结构歧义的能力。其包含多类别歧义句子、消歧句及对应图像。评测显示，尽管现有VLMs某种程度上能利用视觉场景消除结构歧义，但在处理某些歧义类型和细微语义区分时仍存在困难，表明此能力尚有提升空间。
summary_en: Structural ambiguity occurs when a single sentence allows multiple valid interpretations due to its syntactic structure, challenging language understanding. Visual scenes provide helpful cues to resolve such ambiguity, and Vision and Language Models (VLMs) should be able to infer possible meanings from visuals. LaViSA is a benchmark that evaluates VLMs on resolving structural ambiguity using visual scenes. It includes ambiguous sentences, disambiguated sentences, and related images across seven ambiguity categories. Evaluation of various VLMs shows recent models can partially use visual cues to resolve structural ambiguity but still struggle with certain types and subtle semantic differences, revealing remaining limitations.
why_it_matters_zh: 通过结合语言与视觉信息，LaViSA基准推动研究者提升模型处理复杂结构歧义的能力，促进多模态理解技术进步。
why_it_matters_en: By integrating language and visual information, LaViSA benchmark encourages improvements in models’ ability to handle complex structural ambiguities, advancing multimodal understanding technologies.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: LaViSA: A Language and Vision Structural Ambiguity Benchmark. Category: image_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 集群就是一切：利用语言模型的语义集群预训练Tsetlin机器以实现可解释性
title_en: Clusters are All You Need: Pre-Training the Tsetlin Machine with Semantic Clusters from Language Models for Interpretability
summary_zh: 预训练语言模型如BERT在文本分类上表现强劲，但缺乏透明性限制了其在关键场景的应用。Tsetlin机器（TM）提供完全可解释的基于条款的推理，但语义信息捕获有限，且之前尝试结合两者的方法依赖于静态词嵌入，忽视上下文含义。本文提出了一种语义预训练框架，通过无嵌入方式将预训练语言模型的知识转移到TM。文本样本通过K-means或Top2Vec聚成语义一致的集群，基于集群-样本对对非否定TM进行预训练，增强Type I反馈，使TM学习可解释的语义关键词，并在下游任务中微调。实验证明该方法在五个数据集上显著优于传统及基于嵌入的TM，并达到与BERT竞争的性能，同时保持可解释性。
summary_en: Pre-trained language models like BERT achieve strong text classification but lack transparency, limiting their use in high-stakes settings. The Tsetlin Machine (TM) offers fully interpretable, clause-based reasoning but captures little semantic information. Previous attempts combining both relied on static word embeddings missing contextual meaning. This paper proposes a semantic pre-training framework transferring knowledge from pre-trained language models into TM without embeddings. Text samples are grouped into semantically coherent clusters using K-means or Top2Vec, and these cluster-sample pairs pre-train a non-negated TM with enhanced Type I feedback. The TM learns interpretable semantic keywords, fine-tuned on downstream tasks. Experiments across five datasets show the method substantially outperforms vanilla and embedding-based TMs and achieves performance competitive with BERT while remaining interpretable.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究解决了强性能模型缺乏可解释性的问题，提出将语义集群信息传递给可解释的Tsetlin机器，实现性能和透明性的平衡，这对高风险领域的应用极具价值。
why_it_matters_en: This research addresses the trade-off between strong performance and interpretability by transferring semantic cluster information into interpretable Tsetlin Machines, achieving a balance valuable for high-stakes applications.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Clusters are All You Need: Pre-Training the Tsetlin Machine with Semantic Clusters from Language Models for Interpretability. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: MosaicLeaks：你的研究代理能保守秘密吗？
title_en: MosaicLeaks: Can your research agent keep a secret?
summary_zh: Hugging Face 博客探讨了研究代理 MosaicLeaks 的能力，关注其是否能够在研究过程中保护信息的机密性。
summary_en: The Hugging Face Blog discusses the research agent MosaicLeaks, focusing on its ability to maintain confidentiality during research processes.
why_it_matters_zh: 在人工智能和自动化研究中，保护数据和方法的隐私尤为重要。MosaicLeaks 的研究有助于理解代理的保密性能，推动安全可靠的研究实践。
why_it_matters_en: In AI and automated research, protecting the privacy of data and methods is crucial. MosaicLeaks research helps understand agents' confidentiality capabilities, promoting secure and reliable research practices.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: MosaicLeaks: Can your research agent keep a secret?. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 超越LoRA：你能超越最受欢迎的微调技术吗？
title_en: Beyond LoRA: Can you beat the most popular fine-tuning technique?
summary_zh: 本文介绍了LoRA（低秩适应性）作为最流行的模型微调技术，并探讨了是否有可能超越它的方法。
summary_en: This article presents LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation) as the most popular model fine-tuning technique and explores possibilities to surpass it.
why_it_matters_zh: LoRA因其高效和资源节省的优势成为当前微调研究的焦点，理解和挑战它有助于推动AI模型微调技术的发展。
why_it_matters_en: LoRA's efficiency and resource-saving benefits make it the focus of current fine-tuning research; understanding and challenging it aids in advancing AI model tuning techniques.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Beyond LoRA: Can you beat the most popular fine-tuning technique?. Category: tools_apps. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
